response:
Subject: Appeal to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payment Concerns  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to appeal the recent account block due to suspicious payment activities that I did not initiate. The block has caused significant disruption to my account access and has impacted my ability to use Google services.  

I am unaware of any fraudulent transactions linked to my account, and I am confident that the actions taken were based on incorrect assumptions. I would like to request that my account be unblocked and that I be given the opportunity to provide additional information to resolve this matter.  

Thank you for your attention to this issue. I look forward to a prompt resolution.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
